calendar.matters:
Petition For Reformation Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shirley Tam appeared by telephone for Yvonne Gee.

The Court stated that all of the Beneficiaries have joined in on this request and that it is not sure why this is being done and why the Court should analyze it. Ms. Tam stated that distribution eventually comes out of the Trust, that pursuant to how it was written 50/50 goes to both Daughters (Christine and Yvonne), that the Trustees informed her that they had a discussion with the Mom and that the Mom believed the Daughters could redistribute as they wanted. Ms. Tam also stated that she is the Decedent's Trust Attorney, that had she been advised she would have drafted reformation, that the Mom is fine with Yvonne to receive 100% of the property, that Yvonne has taken care of the Decedent her entire life, that they want to preserve the Prop 58 exemption and that there is no spendthrift provision. The Petition for Reformation or Trust is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Reformation Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
